item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A government doctor says FMS gazettement trainees juggle medical officer duties, clinics, and administrative work during a six-month training period. This appears specific to Family Medicine, as other specialties do not routinely undertake MO duties during gazettement. The post Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Nursing is more than bedside care; it is scientific, research-driven, and adaptive. Space nursing demonstrates how far nurses can extend their expertise, reaching environments once thought unreachable. The post Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The continued recognition reflects governance systems that are firmly established across its hospitals, with patient safety and care standards applied consistently across specialties and services. The post IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Sunway Medical Centre is home to more than 300 resident medical consultants and provides comprehensive care across over 80 medical specialties and 28 Centres of Excellence. The post SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Dentist Chair Test Could Detect Hidden Diabetes
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
A six-minute finger-prick test at dental visits could uncover thousands of undiagnosed diabetes and prediabetes cases, researchers say. Press Association
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Doctors With Chronic Pain Learn What Pain Care Truly Means
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
After becoming pain patients themselves, these physicians say they faced a system built to treat anatomy, not suffering. The lessons were humbling — and transformative. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Alopecia Areata May Raise Risk for Autoimmune Diseases
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Patients with new-onset alopecia areata are at increased 10-year risk of developing several immune-mediated inflammatory diseases, according to a study. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Changes in Body Image and Pain Tied to Depression in Cushing
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
A recent longitudinal cohort study shows a statistically significant relationship between body image disturbance, pain, and persistent depression in patients with Cushing syndrome. Medscape News UK
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: CKM Syndrome Recognition and Collaboration Gaining Traction
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
While first-ever guidelines are in the works, experts across specialties share their take on the current state of preventing, diagnosing, and managing CKM syndrome. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Autism Experts Strike a Committee to Counter Federal Panel
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Autism scientists and other experts have launched an independent advisory committee to respond to what it describes as a non-evidence-based narrative from a long-standing federal government panel. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Severe Skin Symptoms in IgA Vasculitis Linked to Relapse
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Children with IgA vasculitis who present with severe skin manifestations may be at higher risk for relapse and should be followed up for at least 1 year. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Belzutifan Combo Could be Second-Line Option in Advanced RCC
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Belzutifan plus lenvatinib significantly improves outcomes vs single agent cabozantinib in patients with advanced RCC who progressed after anti-PD-(L)1 therapy, new data show. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Why More Seniors Are Choosing Assisted Living Over Staying Home
item.description:
Source: Medical News Bulletin (Health)
Medical News Bulletin - Daily Medical News, Health News, Clinical Trials And Clinical Research, Medical Technology, Fitness And Nutrition News–In One Place An increasing number of seniors are choosing assisted living communities over their private homes. While this shift may be shocking to some, many factors are behind the change. Those changing needs include a desire for comfort, safety, and social connection, which become ever more pronounced with age. Due to this, seniors and their families may […] The post Why More Seniors Are Choosing Assisted Living Over Staying Home appeared first on Medical News Bulletin .
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Do Senior Living Communities Increase Life Engagement?
item.description:
Source: Medical News Bulletin (Health)
Medical News Bulletin - Daily Medical News, Health News, Clinical Trials And Clinical Research, Medical Technology, Fitness And Nutrition News–In One Place Most people nearing retirement ask if having a home in a senior living community allows for even more engagement in everyday life. This question pertains to families and older adults. Being welcome and needed are and always will be crucial to every stage of life. Just as you likely want to be involved in local […] The post Do Senior Living Communities Increase Life Engagement? appeared first on Medical News Bulletin .
Matched: ai(+3)
